items.title: Trump Should End the FDA’s 25-Year Cover-Up on the Abortion Pill
items.description: Mifepristone has not gotten safer; the FDA has just gotten more political.

items.title: New York’s Museum of Sex: Serious, Sly, Fun, and Funky
items.description: A collection on sex through the ages explores its power, delights — oh, and there’s plenty of paraphernalia.

items.title: Gallup’s Presidential Approval Misstep
items.description: The polling industry seems increasingly uninterested in its own history.

items.title: The Ugly Deportation Case of Rumeysa Öztürk
items.description: The administration may appeal the latest decision and might well win. But its conduct has conveyed weakness in several respects.

items.title: AI and Our Collapsing Creative Horizons
items.description: The real danger AI poses is to original thought itself.
